message.content:
(1) The visible section is **Projects** (under the "Selected projects" heading, part of the "Featured Work" section).  

(2) Not applicable (no chatbot visible here).  

(3) Projects are displayed as **three dark-themed cards** in a row, each with:  
- A numbered label ([01], [02], [03]) in green.  
- A project title (e.g., "Thrust - Crypto Social Trading Platform").  
- Year + role (e.g., "2025 · Fullstack Engineer").  
- A brief description of the project (tech stack, features, or impact).  
- A "Live" link (on the third card) for interactivity.  

(4) Notable interaction: The "Live" link on the third card suggests a clickable element to view the project live, and the card layout implies hover/focus states (common for portfolio project cards). The "3 of 12 visible" text indicates a scrollable list of projects.
